name: Suite 11 — Edge cases & adversarial
description: Stress-test the edges: legitimately empty results, null handling, synonyms, typos, Arabic + mixed-language questions, and compound questions the Decomposer should split.

Scenarios.Question: tickets created on date 1900-01-01
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = '1900-01-01' AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: users with email containing fake-test-string
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers WHERE Email LIKE '%fake-test-string%'

Scenarios.Question: tickets and any assigned user (show nulls for unassigned)
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, u.UserName FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: what percent of tickets are unassigned
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN AssignedToUserId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS PercentUnassigned FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many issues do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: list all cases
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many tikets are open
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets creat last week
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد التذاكر
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: اعرض التذاكر المفتوحة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد tickets المفتوحة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0
Scenarios._note: Mixed Arabic + English: 'how many open tickets'

Scenarios.Question: how many open tickets and how many closed tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN s.Name = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OpenCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.Name = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ClosedCount FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0
Scenarios._note: Compound question — decomposer may split into two sub-questions or planner emits SUM(CASE) directly

Scenarios.Question: show me the top 3 entities by ticket count and also the top 3 users by tickets created
Scenarios._note: Compound question; decomposer fans out two sub-queries. EX-multiset not feasible — verdict relies on Answer presence + no error

Scenarios.Question: give me total ticket count and the top 5 users by tickets created
